devcontainer_json_created.reason: The file `.devcontainer/devcontainer.json` was created and its content is shown in the diffs as valid JSON with proper structure.

node_base_image.reason: The image field is set to `mcr.microsoft.com/devcontainers/typescript-node`, which contains 'typescript-node' — a Node.js-based devcontainer image.

claude_code_extension.reason: The extensions array in customizations.vscode explicitly includes `"anthropic.claude-code"`.

post_create_command.reason: postCreateCommand is an object with a `"deps": "npm install"` entry, which installs Node.js dependencies.

no_hardcoded_secrets.reason: No API keys, tokens, or any secret values are present in any of the generated files (devcontainer.json, setup-container.sh).

remote_user_set.reason: `remoteUser` is set to `"vscode"`, which is the correct non-root user for `mcr.microsoft.com/devcontainers/*` images.

no_dockerfile.reason: Only `.devcontainer/devcontainer.json` and `.devcontainer/setup-container.sh` were generated. No Dockerfile was created, consistent with the user's request.
